full_text:
Ma Rong (Jichang) 馬融 (季長)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ma Rong (馬融), styledJichang (季長). A scholar with extravagant tastes, he tutored Zheng Xuan. Ma Rong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
